---
name: near-recipe
description: Slightly drifted variant of a baking recipe used to validate that near-duplicate detection clusters skills that share most of their content but not all of it.
---

# near-recipe

The body here intentionally overlaps heavily with another skill of the same
name so that MinHash clusters them as a near-duplicate while the content
hash stays distinct.

## Steps

1. Combine flour, sugar, and softened butter in a mixing bowl.
2. Whisk together until the dough is smooth and slightly glossy.
3. Bake at 180 degrees Celsius for twenty-five minutes.
4. Cool on a wire rack before serving.
5. Slice into squares for portioning before serving.
6. Pair with coffee or tea for the best flavor experience overall.
